name: Splunk Inc.
description: Splunk Inc. is a leading technology company that provides a unified platform for security and observability, enabling organizations to gain real-time insights from their machine-generated data. By leveraging artificial intelligence and advanced analytics, Splunk helps enterprises detect threats, monitor IT infrastructure, and ensure digital resilience across complex environments. The company offers a comprehensive suite of solutions for security operations, IT modernization, and application performance monitoring. Now a part of Cisco, Splunk continues to empower businesses worldwide to manage massive data streams, reduce downtime, and accelerate their digital transformation initiatives through actionable intelligence.
